nodes.title: Fill out the following information to let the AI know the context of the user flow you would like to build

001 | Who is the user?

Ex: teacher, new employee, admin

003 | What is the starting point in the journey?

Ex: Landing on homepage, receiving an email

004 | What's the key action or experience you want the journey to highlight?

Ex: Checkout, deliver lesson to students

002 | What is the main goal or outcome?

Ex: buying a product, completing a lesson

004 | Where does the journey take place?

In a classroom, mobile app, physical store

006 | Any constraints or special considerations?

Ex: Limited time, accessibility
Hit "run" below to generate a 6 step user journey flow that will be used throughout the rest of the board. Feel free to edit the information as you see fit.

The flow will automatically generate images for each step in the user journey. If any image doesn't feel right feel free to hit run on the prompt above that image.

Objective: Map out a user journey. Use AI to develop a storyboard, pain points, highlights and even a prototype.


Why: Put yourself in your users shoes to understand the full scope of their journey
Click "run" to start the AI Flow
Hey, thanks for checking out this board. I hope it's useful to you in your everyday product work. Make sure to check out my other templates on the Miroverse!

New Employee Onboarding — 6-Step Journey

Step 1: Receive Onboarding Invite

Description: New employee receives an email with credentials and a link to the onboarding site or desktop application. This email is the starting point and sets the first-week completion expectation.

Step 2: Access Onboarding Platform

Description: Employee signs in to the onboarding site or opens the desktop application and lands on the onboarding dashboard. The dashboard shows required modules, progress, and time estimates.

Step 3: Complete Company Overview

Description: Employee completes core modules covering company mission, policies, and high-level org information to understand company context. Modules combine short videos, readings, and quick checks.

Step 4: Complete Role-Specific Training

Description: Employee works through assigned, role-specific modules that teach day-to-day responsibilities and tools needed for the job. Training includes hands-on exercises in the desktop application where applicable.

Step 5: Pass Assessments & Acknowledge

Description: Employee completes short assessments or checklists to confirm understanding and acknowledges key policies and role responsibilities. Passing triggers automated recording of completion.

Step 6: Confirm Completion & Integrate

Description: System notifies HR and the manager; employee receives confirmation and next steps (1:1 meeting, access changes, assigned tasks) to integrate into their team. Completion status is recorded in the employee record.
Fill out the following information to let the AI know the context of the user flow you would like to build

001 | Who is the user?

Ex: teacher, new employee, admin

003 | What is the starting point in the journey?

Ex: Landing on homepage, receiving an email

004 | What's the key action or experience you want the journey to highlight?

Ex: Checkout, deliver lesson to students

002 | What is the main goal or outcome?

Ex: buying a product, completing a lesson

004 | Where does the journey take place?

In a classroom, mobile app, physical store
Needs to complete in the first week on the job

006 | Any constraints or special considerations?

Ex: Limited time, accessibility
Hit "run" below to generate a 6 step user journey flow that will be used throughout the rest of the board. Feel free to edit the information as you see fit.
Copy and paste the steps from the AI generated journey in step 2 into the stickies below. This will help you get a clear visual of the entire flow
The flow will automatically generate images for each step in the user journey. If any image doesn't feel right feel free to hit run on the prompt above that image.
Finally, AI will generate a first draft prototype of a UI that the user would use throughout their user journey. Feel free to hit "run" again on the prompt to generate a new prototype
Click "run" to start the AI Flow

The flow will automatically generate a slide deck with key information for each step in the user journey. If the output doesn't feel right feel free to hit run on the prompt to re-generate or edit the slides as you wish.
• Open welcome email and review expectations
• Email lost in inbox or spam
• Unclear instructions or too many links
Curious but cautious; excited to start; mildly overwhelmed by information density; eager for clarity
• Clear email with single primary call-to-action
• Include support contact and quick-start video
• Review dashboard modules and time estimates
• Set a plan for the week
Motivated to begin but slightly apprehensive about workload; seeking orientation and appreciative of guidance.
• Offer a guided tour with clear sequencing
• Read summaries and complete quick checks
• Content too long or not tailored to role
Interested in company context but attention fluctuates; wants practical takeaways and feels satisfied when progress is visible.
• Perform hands-on exercises in desktop app
Focused and task-oriented; confidence grows with practice; frustration spikes during setup hurdles; eager to apply learning
• Take short assessments and complete checklists
• Ambiguous questions and uncertainty about criteria
Determined to finish but slightly anxious about scoring; relief upon passing with desire for clear confirmation
• Clarify pass thresholds and retake policies
• Consolidate attestations into a single flow
• Receive completion confirmation and review next steps
Accomplished and ready to meet team; needs certainty on logistics and appreciates recognition of completion.
• Instant notifications with clear next steps
Finally, AI will generate a first draft prototype of a UI that the user would use throughout their user journey. Feel free to hit "run" again on the prompt to generate a new prototype

The flow will automatically generate a slide deck with key information for each step in the user journey. If the output doesn't feel right feel free to hit run on the prompt to re-generate or edit the slides as you wish.
Your onboarding journey is designed to help you integrate smoothly into our team and culture. Through this process, you'll learn about our company, your role, and gain the tools needed to succeed.
Complete your onboarding within your first week for the best experience.
Use the credentials provided in your welcome email to access your personalized onboarding journey.
Please sign in with your company credentials to continue your onboarding journey
Having trouble with your onboarding? Contact your HR representative or manager.
Learn how to use our customer management system to efficiently handle customer inquiries and resolve issues.
Practice handling a customer complaint using the CRM system.
I've been waiting for my refund for over a week now. Can you help me?
Learn about our company's approach to handling sensitive customer information and compliance with data protection regulations.
Complete all exercises to unlock the final assessment. You can revisit any module at any time from your dashboard.
Complete this assessment to confirm your understanding
Which of the following is NOT an acceptable practice for handling customer data according to our policy?
Storing encrypted data on approved cloud services
Emailing unencrypted customer information to your personal email
Using VPN when accessing company systems remotely
Emailing unencrypted customer data to personal email violates our security policy and data protection regulations.
Review the Data Security Policy for more information on proper data handling procedures.
If you need to review the training material before continuing:
Your HR representative and manager have been automatically notified of your successful completion.
System permissions will be updated within 24 hours
4 tasks assigned for your first week
Your team is excited to welcome you! Be sure to check your assigned tasks to get started.
